style: Retro 8-bit / chiptune procedural SFX (sfxr family) for a Grave-Seasons / Stardew-Valley-style pixel RPG. Short, punchy, game-ready one-shots plus a few loops.

procedural.note: DrPetter's sfxr synth, ported to pure Python (pipeline/sfxr.py). Deterministic per (preset, seed). Free, offline, no API key.

ai.note: Optional realistic/foley upgrade. Used automatically when ELEVENLABS_API_KEY is set (or --engine ai). Costs credits; gated by budget.min_ai_credits_remaining.

catalog.name: Coin Pickup
catalog.description: a bright, short metallic jingle played when the player picks up a gold coin
catalog.ai_prompt: short bright metallic coin pickup chime, single coin, clean retro game UI sound
catalog.usage: Play on gold_coin / gold_ingot pickup and shop sales.

catalog.name: Gem Pickup
catalog.description: a sparkly ascending chime for collecting a gem or valuable
catalog.ai_prompt: sparkly crystalline pickup chime, ascending, collecting a shiny gem, retro game
catalog.usage: Play on gem_ruby and other high-value pickups.

catalog.name: Item Get
catalog.description: a cheerful little fanfare for receiving a new item into the inventory
catalog.ai_prompt: short triumphant item-get jingle, receiving a new item, cheerful retro RPG
catalog.usage: Play when a tool or item enters the inventory.

catalog.name: Menu Select
catalog.description: a soft neutral blip when moving the cursor between menu options
catalog.ai_prompt: soft short UI blip, menu cursor move, neutral retro game interface
catalog.usage: Cursor movement in menus and dialogs.

catalog.name: Menu Confirm
catalog.description: a bright positive blip confirming a menu choice
catalog.ai_prompt: bright positive confirmation blip, accept menu choice, retro game UI
catalog.usage: Confirming/accepting a selection.

catalog.name: Menu Cancel
catalog.description: a low descending blip for backing out or cancelling
catalog.ai_prompt: low descending cancel blip, back out of menu, retro game UI
catalog.usage: Cancel / back / close a menu.

catalog.name: Error Buzz
catalog.description: a short harsh buzz signalling an invalid or blocked action
catalog.ai_prompt: short harsh error buzz, invalid action denied, retro game UI
catalog.usage: Invalid action, not enough money, blocked placement.

catalog.name: Notification
catalog.description: a gentle two-note tone announcing a notification or new message
catalog.ai_prompt: gentle pleasant notification tone, new message alert, soft retro game
catalog.usage: New chat message / quest notification.

catalog.name: Chest Open
catalog.description: a rising creak-and-clunk as a wooden chest is opened
catalog.ai_prompt: wooden treasure chest opening, creak and latch clunk, then soft shimmer, retro game
catalog.usage: Opening wooden_chest / containers.

catalog.name: Chest Close
catalog.description: a short wooden thud as a chest lid closes
catalog.ai_prompt: wooden chest lid closing, short muffled wooden thud, retro game
catalog.usage: Closing wooden_chest / containers.

catalog.name: Key Unlock
catalog.description: a metallic click-clunk of a key turning in a lock
catalog.ai_prompt: metallic key turning in a lock, click and clunk, unlocking a door, retro game
catalog.usage: Using iron_key / unlocking a door or chest.

catalog.name: Drink Potion
catalog.description: a bubbly gulp-and-sparkle of drinking a potion
catalog.ai_prompt: drinking a magic potion, bubbly gulp then healing sparkle, retro game
catalog.usage: Consuming a potion / healing item.

catalog.name: Eat Food
catalog.description: a soft munch-and-satisfied blip of eating food
catalog.ai_prompt: eating food, soft munch and a small satisfied chime, retro game
catalog.usage: Eating a food item to restore energy.

catalog.name: Sword Swing
catalog.description: a quick whoosh of a sword swung through the air
catalog.ai_prompt: quick sword swing whoosh through the air, no impact, retro game combat
catalog.usage: Swinging the sword (miss / wind-up).

catalog.name: Sword Hit
catalog.description: a sharp metallic clang of a sword striking a target
catalog.ai_prompt: sharp metallic sword impact, blade hitting armor, short clang, retro game
catalog.usage: Sword connecting with an enemy or object.

catalog.name: Axe Chop
catalog.description: a heavy wooden thock of an axe biting into a tree
catalog.ai_prompt: axe chopping wood, heavy wooden thock, chopping a tree, retro game
catalog.usage: Chopping oak_tree / pine_tree with the axe.

catalog.name: Pickaxe Hit
catalog.description: a sharp stony crack of a pickaxe striking rock
catalog.ai_prompt: pickaxe striking stone, sharp rocky crack and chip, mining ore, retro game
catalog.usage: Mining rock / ore with the pickaxe.

catalog.name: Hoe Till
catalog.description: a gritty dig of a hoe breaking soil
catalog.ai_prompt: hoe tilling soil, short gritty dirt dig, breaking ground on a farm, retro game
catalog.usage: Tilling a soil tile with the hoe.

catalog.name: Watering Can
catalog.description: a soft splash of water poured from a watering can
catalog.ai_prompt: watering can pouring water onto soil, gentle sprinkling splash, retro farming game
catalog.usage: Watering crops with the watering can.

catalog.name: Footstep (Grass)
catalog.description: a soft muffled step on grass
catalog.ai_prompt: single soft muffled footstep on grass, walking, retro game foley
catalog.usage: Per-step while walking on grass/foliage tiles.

catalog.name: Footstep (Stone)
catalog.description: a crisp tap of a step on stone or pavement
catalog.ai_prompt: single crisp footstep on stone pavement, walking, retro game foley
catalog.usage: Per-step while walking on stone/path tiles.

catalog.name: Footstep (Wood)
catalog.description: a hollow knock of a step on a wooden floor
catalog.ai_prompt: single hollow footstep on a wooden floor, walking, retro game foley
catalog.usage: Per-step while walking on wood/bridge tiles.

catalog.name: Jump
catalog.description: a short upward blip as the character hops
catalog.ai_prompt: short upward jump hop blip, character jumping, retro platformer game
catalog.usage: Character jump / hop.

catalog.name: Water Splash
catalog.description: a wet splash of stepping or falling into water
catalog.ai_prompt: water splash, stepping or falling into water, single wet splash, retro game
catalog.usage: Entering water / fishing bobber landing.

catalog.name: Take Damage
catalog.description: a short pained grunt-blip when the player takes damage
catalog.ai_prompt: player takes damage, short pained hit blip, retro game combat
catalog.usage: Player / entity takes damage.

catalog.name: Enemy Defeat
catalog.description: a descending puff as an enemy is defeated and vanishes
catalog.ai_prompt: enemy defeated, short descending poof and vanish, retro game combat
catalog.usage: Enemy defeated / despawns.

catalog.name: Explosion
catalog.description: a punchy boom for bombs and destructible objects
catalog.ai_prompt: punchy retro game explosion, bomb blast, destroying an object, 8-bit boom
catalog.usage: Bombs, barrels, destructibles breaking.

catalog.name: Magic Cast
catalog.description: a shimmering rising sweep of casting a spell
catalog.ai_prompt: casting a magic spell, shimmering rising energy sweep, retro fantasy game
catalog.usage: Casting a spell / using magic.

catalog.name: Level Up
catalog.description: a bright ascending fanfare for gaining a level
catalog.ai_prompt: level up fanfare, bright ascending arpeggio, character progression, retro RPG
catalog.usage: Player gains a level / skill increases.

catalog.name: Quest Complete
catalog.description: a triumphant little jingle marking a completed quest
catalog.ai_prompt: quest complete jingle, triumphant short success fanfare, retro RPG
catalog.usage: Completing a quest / objective.
